name: Frontend Developer
description: Web UI development: React/Vue/Svelte, design systems, browser testing.

skills.rationale: Production-grade UI generation with non-generic aesthetics
Catches React/Next.js perf foot-guns and server-component mistakes
Inventories existing components before creating another variant
Reviews generated UI for reuse against existing primitives
Adds UX patterns, palettes, layout systems, and design critique beyond basic code generation
Applies concrete typography, motion, layout, and visual-detail checks

agents.rationale: Catches React anti-patterns and accessibility issues
Runs a focused pass for keyboard, contrast, semantics, and screen-reader regressions

mcp.rationale: Browser automation for visual regression + a11y checks
Fetches current framework/library docs before coding against fast-moving frontend APIs
Generates and refines polished UI components from a design-oriented component source
